name: netlist2svg
description: rendering a schematic from a netlist
author: Neil Turley

scripts.build: tsc && esbuild lib/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=built/index.esm.js --packages=external && npm run build-module && npm run build-demo
scripts.test: npm run -s test-examples && npm run -s lint && jest
scripts.build-demo: cp docs/index.html . && cp node_modules/elkjs/lib/elk.bundled.js . && esbuild docs/demo.js --bundle --outfile=bundle.js --platform=browser --external:elkjs --banner:js="const require = (name) => name === 'elkjs' ? window.ELK : undefined;"
scripts.build-module: esbuild jsmodule/index.js --bundle --format=iife --global-name=netlist2svg --outfile=built/netlist2svg.bundle.js --loader:.svg=text --loader:.json5=text --platform=browser --external:elkjs --banner:js="const require = (name) => name === 'elkjs' ? window.ELK : undefined;"
